findings.recommendation: Prefer PyPI Trusted Publishing/OIDC when configured; until then, keep the publish credential narrowly scoped, rotated, and protected by maintainer review.
findings.summary: Release publish path references a PyPI publish credential environment.

findings.recommendation: Keep write scope isolated to release workflows and protect release workflow changes with CODEOWNERS/rulesets.
Require operator verification of the requested tag, release preflight output, and package version before manual dispatch.

recommended_next_actions: Do not claim release automation is authorized by this report.
Keep provenance/attestation evidence attached to release runs.
Prefer PyPI Trusted Publishing/OIDC when the PyPI project is configured for it.
Review release workflow changes through CODEOWNERS/rulesets.
Treat credential-based publishing as review-required until Trusted Publishing is configured.
unverified_settings: GitHub environment protection and required reviewers for publish jobs
branch protection / rulesets for release workflow changes
repository secret inventory and rotation status
